heading: Full faith and credit of the United States
label: 938 Full faith and credit of the United States
text: Any contract of insurance or guarantee executed by the Secretary under this subchapter shall be an obligation supported by the full faith and credit of the United States and incontestable except for fraud or misrepresentation of which the holder had actual knowledge at the time it became a holder.
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 103–3541975— substituted “of which the holder had actual knowledge at the time it became a holder” for “of which the holder has actual knowledge”.Pub. L. 94–124
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .May 11, 1973section 12 of Pub. L. 93–32section 930 of this title
amendments: Amendments1994— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 103–3541975— substituted “of which the holder had actual knowledge at the time it became a holder” for “of which the holder has actual knowledge”.Pub. L. 94–124
